_comment: STAGING-ONLY operator-declared node-identity map for the M7 window topology view (F1; see docs/TOPOLOGY_AND_DEVIANTS.md §3). It is the DEMO's source of human-legible node NAMES — and nothing else. The topology SHAPE, edges, and volumes are REAL observed traffic from the live engine; only these names are staging metadata. In production this map is the customer's OWN service registry / CMDB export (IP/CIDR/port -> name), or SPIFFE service names from the mTLS peer cert. The engine does NOT natively know service names; it knows hashed adjacency. THIS IS A DIFFERENT CONCERN from ground-truth-registry.json (the stagedlabel calibration ground truth) — leave that file untouched; the node resolver (internal/topology/identity) does not import the labeler. The demo mesh is all-loopback 127.0.0.1 (deploy/m7-window/server-compose.yml), so the LISTEN PORT disambiguates each service, not the IP — hence the port-only service entries.
